metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: AWS rolls the dice for faster, more efficient networking

crew_quote: "Did you see the weather? It’s like a perfect balmy day for a curry! Just the right temperature to enjoy a takeaway in style… if only we had one!"
